Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the Codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 27 
CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) files. Each entry contains variable details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ALZH 

LABEL: Alzheimer's Disease End-of-Year Indicator
